question: Can deterministic learning-rate backtracking preserve the Q2.4 cumulative replay ceiling while reopening the quantity-learning path?
independent_variable: transactional AdamW with first-feasible geometric learning-rate backtracking under the immutable all-slice cumulative replay guard

lineage.diagnosis: Q2.4 enforced its cumulative safety boundary, but after 66 commits every full-size candidate exceeded 0.015 and eight consecutive outer attempts rolled back before the first public checkpoint. The v1 guard needs a candidate-construction response, not a looser gate.

guard.baseline: arithmetic mean of the six frozen replay validation-window losses evaluated by the immutable ZERO.3 initialization
guard.candidate: arithmetic mean of those same six losses after each candidate AdamW trial and before commit
guard.decision: restore the pre-attempt learned state before each retry and commit the first finite trial whose cumulative relative increase is at most 0.015; reject the outer attempt if all trials fail
guard.trial_budget_accounting: all trials reuse one frozen minibatch, clipped gradient, proposed committed-update index, and pre-attempt AdamW state; only the outer attempt consumes the attempt budget
guard.moment_policy: weights and AdamW moments are restored before every retry; the same moment update is reapplied with only the learning rate scaled
guard.selection_policy: first feasible trial in descending scale order
guard.threshold_rationale: Q2.5 inherits Q2.4's preregistered 0.015 hard authority and 0.005 reserve below the public ceiling; no Q2.4 outcome changes either gate.

outcomes.go: a public checkpoint satisfies every quantity gate and replay regression <= 0.02, then the sealed promotion split also satisfies every quantity gate
outcomes.no_go: no jointly feasible public checkpoint exists before a frozen stop condition, with promotion remaining sealed

stop_conditions: replay exceeds 0.02 on two consecutive full evaluations
eight consecutive outer attempts exhaust all eight backtracking trials
no Pareto improvement for 200 committed updates
the frozen 1000 acquisition plus 400 consolidation outer-attempt budget is exhausted
promotion_policy: open the disjoint promotion split exactly once only after a jointly feasible public checkpoint; otherwise record no-go
replication_policy: run seeds 1 and 3 only if diagnostic seed 2 passes
